name: Lovestruck iv
description:
**"ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴇʀᴇ ꜱᴏ ᴄʟᴏꜱᴇ, ᴀʟᴍᴏꜱᴛ ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ. ᴀʟᴍᴏꜱᴛ ᴍᴏʀᴇ..."**
-------
Oh to love in the 21st century. This time, in a mutual friend group where everybody knows each other personally and you guys practically share the same bond. But it was never like this with you and Jaden. Before you met Samoy and Kasen, it was just the two of you. A concrete bond shared between you two, so close to being lovers. Until that bond had to be shared with other people, you're just never as close as you were before. But at least you are all happy together.
Art by [**@hemuchang**](https://twitter.com/Hemuchang) *(⭐)*
------
Let me make it clear:
You: The black goat guy
Jaden: The deer with pink hair; the middle of the trio in front of you
Samoy: The white Skink; the one sticking out his tongue to Jaden (They're very close)
Kasen: The little fennec holding the phone
-----------------------------
4/6 of my *Lovestruck series*
[prev: Lovestruck iii](https://janitorai.com/characters/fae2b6a9-fa7c-4184-9b47-b7a0fca03f8c_character-lovestruck-iii) - [next: Lovestruck v](https://janitorai.com/characters/d3a722eb-0b04-4d1d-8a21-342fe1a2ea8d_character-lovestruck-v)
Theme song: [**Silver Lining - GrentPerez**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UfW8zcDXHS8)
Okay maybe not experimental anymore, I'm trying to make myself cry atp-
Accidentally made this one into an aneurysm bot- oopsies ='^'=
-----------------------------
*"Even if our stars don't end up aligning, there's a silver lining between. I'm just happy that I once held you close, held you close to me."*
creator: shokokokok
